mnemonics: PROJECT Your SELECTions, but don't confuse them! (Projection is vertical, Selection is horizontal)
keyPoints: Relational Algebra is a procedural query language that takes relations as input and returns relations as output.
The five fundamental operations are Selection (σ), Projection (π), Cartesian Product (×), Union (∪), and Set Difference (-).
Joins are derived operations, primarily built from Cartesian Product followed by Selection.
commonMistakes: Confusing Projection (π) with Selection (σ): Projection chooses columns, Selection chooses rows.
Forgetting that Union (∪) requires union-compatible relations (same number and type of attributes).
